top_signals.title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan Official Sows Doubt Over Potential US Treasuries Sales
top_signals.summary: A senior Japanese Finance Ministry official sowed doubt over any prospects for the nation to sell US Treasuries as part of any move to prop up the yen, suggesting the maneuver could end up being counterproductive.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Experts warn of privacy risks as AI firms looks to connect to financial accounts
top_signals.summary: OpenAI announced Friday that it is rolling out a new ChatGPT feature allowing users to connect all of their financial accounts to the chatbot for personal finance advice.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Royal Caribbean Slides After Mexico Reviews Water Park Plan
top_signals.summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. shares fell after Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum ordered a review of the cruise line operator’s water park project in Quintana Roo state.

top_signals.title: SHub macOS infostealer variant spoofs Apple security updates
top_signals.summary: A new variant of the 'SHub' macOS infostealer uses AppleScript to show a fake security update message and installs a backdoor. [...]
